Puzzle.doc: represents a parsed Chia puzzle, including its hash, curried arguments, and the module it was identified as.

parse_cat_info.doc: attempts to identify this puzzle as a CAT outer layer and extract the asset ID and inner puzzle.

parse_cat.doc: parses a CAT coin and its solution to extract the full CAT state including lineage proof.

parse_child_cats.doc: parses the children of a spent CAT coin to extract the resulting CAT coins.

parse_nft_info.doc: attempts to identify this puzzle as an NFT singleton and extract the NFT info and inner puzzle.

parse_nft.doc: parses an NFT coin and its solution to extract the full NFT state.

parse_child_nft.doc: parses the child of a spent NFT to extract the updated NFT state.

parse_did_info.doc: attempts to identify this puzzle as a DID singleton and extract the DID info and inner puzzle.

parse_did.doc: parses a DID coin and its solution to extract the full DID state.

parse_child_did.doc: parses the child of a spent DID to extract the updated DID state.

parse_option_info.doc: attempts to identify this puzzle as an option contract singleton and extract its info.

parse_option.doc: parses an option contract coin and its solution to extract the full option state.

parse_child_option.doc: parses the child of a spent option contract to extract the updated option state.

parse_inner_streaming_puzzle.doc: attempts to identify this puzzle as a streaming (vesting) inner puzzle and extract its parameters.

parse_child_clawbacks.doc: parses the children of a spent coin to extract any clawback-wrapped outputs.

parse_bulletin.doc: parses a bulletin board coin and its solution to extract the bulletin state and messages.

parse_child_p2_parent.doc: parses the children of a spent coin to find pay-to-parent-coin outputs.

StreamedAssetParsingResult.doc: holds the result of parsing a streamed asset, including whether the last spend was a clawback.

Cat.doc: represents a CAT (Chia Asset Token) coin with its lineage proof and asset information.

child_lineage_proof.doc: computes the lineage proof that child CAT coins will need to reference this coin.

child.doc: creates an expected child CAT coin with the given inner puzzle hash and amount.

unrevocable_child.doc: creates an expected child CAT coin without the revocation layer.

CatInfo.doc: holds the identifying information for a CAT: the asset ID (TAIL hash), optional hidden puzzle hash, and inner puzzle hash.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash of the CAT (inside the CAT outer layer).

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the full puzzle hash of the CAT coin (outer CAT layer wrapping the inner puzzle).

CatSpend.doc: pairs a CAT coin with its inner spend for use in a batch CAT transaction.

new.doc: creates a new CAT spend pairing a CAT coin with its inner spend.

revoke.doc: creates a CAT spend that revokes the hidden puzzle, converting a revocable CAT to a standard CAT.

ParsedCatInfo.doc: holds the parsed CAT info and inner puzzle extracted from a CAT puzzle.

ParsedCat.doc: holds the fully parsed CAT state including the inner puzzle and solution.

Nft.doc: represents an NFT singleton coin with its lineage proof and metadata.

child_proof.doc: computes the lineage proof that the child NFT will need to reference this coin.

child.doc: creates an expected child NFT with updated inner puzzle hash, owner, and metadata.

child_with.doc: creates an expected child NFT with the given NftInfo, preserving the lineage proof.

NftInfo.doc: holds the identifying information for an NFT: launcher ID, metadata, royalty settings, and current owner DID.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash of the NFT (inside the singleton and NFT layers).

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the full puzzle hash of the NFT singleton coin.

ParsedNftInfo.doc: holds the parsed NFT info and inner puzzle extracted from an NFT puzzle.

ParsedNft.doc: holds the fully parsed NFT state including the inner puzzle and solution.

NftMetadata.doc: holds the standard NFT metadata fields: edition info, data/metadata/license URIs and hashes.

MetadataUpdate.doc: represents a single URI addition to NFT metadata (data, metadata, or license URI).

UriKind.doc: specifies the type of URI being added to NFT metadata.

NftMint.doc: holds the parameters for minting a new NFT: metadata, royalty settings, and destination.

MintedNfts.doc: holds the result of minting NFTs: the new NFT singletons and conditions for the parent coin.

Did.doc: represents a DID (Decentralized Identity) singleton coin on the Chia blockchain.

child_proof.doc: computes the lineage proof that the child DID will need to reference this coin.

child.doc: creates an expected child DID with updated inner puzzle hash and metadata.

child_with.doc: creates an expected child DID with the given DidInfo, preserving the lineage proof.

DidInfo.doc: holds the identifying information for a DID: launcher ID, recovery list, metadata, and inner puzzle hash.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash of the DID (inside the singleton layer).

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the full puzzle hash of the DID singleton coin.

ParsedDidInfo.doc: holds the parsed DID info and inner puzzle extracted from a DID puzzle.

ParsedDid.doc: holds the fully parsed DID state including the optional inner spend.

ParsedDidSpend.doc: holds the inner puzzle and solution extracted from a DID spend.

CreatedDid.doc: holds the result of creating an eve DID: the new DID singleton and conditions for the parent coin.

OptionContract.doc: represents an on-chain option contract singleton that can be exercised or expire.

child_proof.doc: computes the lineage proof that the child option will need to reference this coin.

child.doc: creates an expected child option contract with the given inner puzzle hash.

child_with.doc: creates an expected child option contract with the given OptionInfo.

OptionInfo.doc: holds the identifying information for an option contract: launcher ID, underlying coin, and delegated puzzle hash.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash of the option contract.

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the full puzzle hash of the option contract singleton.

ParsedOptionInfo.doc: holds the parsed option contract info and inner puzzle.

ParsedOption.doc: holds the fully parsed option contract state including the inner puzzle and solution.

OptionUnderlying.doc: represents the underlying asset locked in an option contract, including strike price and expiration.

exercise_spend.doc: creates the spend to exercise the option, releasing the underlying asset to the holder.

clawback_spend.doc: creates the spend to claw back the underlying asset after the option expires.

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the puzzle hash of the underlying asset coin.

delegated_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the delegated puzzle hash used to link the option singleton to the underlying.

OptionMetadata.doc: holds the metadata stored in an option contract singleton: expiration time and strike type.

OptionType.doc: represents the strike price type for an option contract: XCH, CAT, revocable CAT, or NFT.

xch.doc: creates an XCH strike price with the given amount.

cat.doc: creates a CAT strike price with the given asset ID and amount.

revocable_cat.doc: creates a revocable CAT strike price with the given asset ID, hidden puzzle hash, and amount.

nft.doc: creates an NFT strike price with the given launcher ID, settlement puzzle hash, and amount.

to_xch.doc: returns the XCH strike parameters if this is an XCH option, or nil otherwise.

to_cat.doc: returns the CAT strike parameters if this is a CAT option, or nil otherwise.

to_revocable_cat.doc: returns the revocable CAT strike parameters if this is a revocable CAT option, or nil otherwise.

to_nft.doc: returns the NFT strike parameters if this is an NFT option, or nil otherwise.

OptionTypeXch.doc: holds the XCH strike price amount for an option contract.

OptionTypeCat.doc: holds the CAT strike price parameters for an option contract.

OptionTypeRevocableCat.doc: holds the revocable CAT strike price parameters for an option contract.

OptionTypeNft.doc: holds the NFT strike price parameters for an option contract.

standard_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the puzzle hash of the standard transaction puzzle for the given synthetic key.

cat_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the full CAT puzzle hash from the asset ID and inner puzzle hash.

StreamingPuzzleInfo.doc: holds the parameters of a streaming (vesting) payment puzzle: recipient, clawback, timing, and payment state.

amount_to_be_paid.doc: calculates the amount that can be claimed at the given payment time based on the vesting schedule.

get_hint.doc: computes the hint used to discover streaming payment coins for the given recipient.

get_launch_hints.doc: returns the hint memos to embed when creating a streaming payment coin.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash of the streaming payment puzzle.

from_memos.doc: reconstructs the streaming puzzle info from coin memos, if they match the expected format.

StreamedAsset.doc: represents a streaming (vesting) asset coin, which can be XCH or a CAT.

xch.doc: creates a streamed XCH asset from the given coin and streaming info.

cat.doc: creates a streamed CAT asset from the given coin, asset ID, lineage proof, and streaming info.

ClawbackV2.doc: represents a v2 clawback coin that can be reclaimed by the sender within a time window or claimed by the receiver after.

from_memo.doc: reconstructs a v2 clawback from its coin memo and expected parameters.

sender_spend.doc: wraps an inner spend to reclaim the clawback coin as the sender (before the timelock expires).

receiver_spend.doc: wraps an inner spend to claim the clawback coin as the receiver (after the timelock expires).

push_through_spend.doc: creates a spend that pushes the clawback coin through to the receiver after the timelock.

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the puzzle hash of this clawback coin.

memo.doc: encodes the clawback parameters as a CLVM memo for embedding in coin hints.

Clawback.doc: represents a v1 clawback coin with a timelock, sender, and receiver puzzle hashes.

sender_spend.doc: wraps an inner spend to reclaim the clawback coin as the sender (before the timelock expires).

receiver_spend.doc: wraps an inner spend to claim the clawback coin as the receiver (after the timelock expires).

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the puzzle hash of this clawback coin.

get_remark_condition.doc: creates the REMARK condition that identifies this coin as a clawback for wallet discovery.

MedievalVaultHint.doc: holds the hint data for discovering medieval vault coins: launcher ID, threshold, and public keys.

MedievalVaultInfo.doc: holds the configuration of a medieval vault: launcher ID, M-of-N threshold, and the list of BLS public keys.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash of the medieval vault.

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the full puzzle hash of the medieval vault singleton.

from_hint.doc: reconstructs vault info from a discovered vault hint.

to_hint.doc: converts the vault info into a hint for coin discovery.

MedievalVault.doc: represents a medieval vault singleton — a BLS M-of-N multisig vault on the Chia blockchain.

child.doc: creates an expected child vault after a rekey operation with new M-of-N parameters.

Bulletin.doc: represents an on-chain bulletin board singleton for publishing messages.

conditions.doc: generates the CLVM conditions needed to post the bulletin's messages on-chain.

spend.doc: spends the bulletin singleton with the given inner spend, posting its messages.

BulletinMessage.doc: represents a single message in a bulletin board, with a topic and content string.

CreatedBulletin.doc: holds the result of creating a bulletin: the new bulletin singleton and conditions for the parent coin.

bulletin_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the puzzle hash of a bulletin board singleton for the given hidden puzzle hash.

P2ParentCoin.doc: represents a pay-to-parent-coin puzzle, where a coin can only be spent by its parent coin's owner.

inner_puzzle_hash.doc: computes the inner puzzle hash of the pay-to-parent-coin puzzle for the given asset ID.

puzzle_hash.doc: computes the full puzzle hash of the pay-to-parent-coin for the given asset ID.

spend.doc: spends the pay-to-parent-coin with a delegated spend from the parent's owner.

P2ParentCoinChildParseResult.doc: holds a parsed pay-to-parent-coin child and its associated memos.
